diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 

 ckpt_dir = os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint) or '.'

 ckpt_paths = [args.checkpoint]

-for name in ['m1.pt', 'm2.pt', 'm3.pt']:

+for name in ['m1.pt', 'm3.pt']:

     p = os.path.join(ckpt_dir, name)

     if os.path.exists(p) and p != args.checkpoint:

         ckpt_paths.append(p)
